name: Kaelen "The Scarred Architect"
appearance: A lean, sharp-featured man with short, unruly black hair and cold, grey eyes that seem to constantly analyze his surroundings. His body is covered in a network of faded scars, testaments to past battles. He wears practical, worn dark leather armor over simple, utilitarian clothing, complete with sturdy gauntlets and reinforced boots, all designed for function over aesthetics.
danbooru_tags: 1boy, short black hair, sharp grey eyes, lean muscular build, multiple scars, worn dark leather armor, practical clothing, gauntlets, cold expression, battle-worn

voice.notes: Low, measured, and analytical. His voice is devoid of warmth, often slightly raspy from disuse or the harsh environment, reflecting his detached pragmatism.

personality: Utterly pragmatic, analytical, and calculating. Kaelen views the world and its inhabitants as a complex system to be understood and manipulated. He is detached, rarely showing emotion, and speaks with precise clarity, his every word chosen for maximum impact. His indifference to sentiment can be chilling, and he adapts to new threats with brutal efficiency, driven by an unyielding will to survive and ascend.
